html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Portage Conch can be crafted at a level 2 Combriner. It has 10 uses. When used, it teleports the player to Hermit Home and increases their Wetness by 15. This Wetness can be reduced by Wetness-resistant clothing like Umbrella. The Portage Conch has no distance limit, but cannot be used in the Cave world.

Playing the Portage Conch can also tend the Farm Plants within 3 Tiles radius.

Assets

  • Portage Conch Used

Gallery

  • Portage Conch concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

Trivia

  • The Portage Conch was added in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.

–Webber

–Warly
“To crabby friend!”
–Wormwood

–Wortox
“Miss crabby lady.”
–Wurt
“Aw, we can visit Ms. Pearl instantly!”
–Walter
“How long has it been since I last paid Pearl a visit?”
–Wanda

'''Portage Conch''' can be crafted at a level 2 [[Combriner]]. It has 10 uses. When used, it teleports the player to [[Hermit Home]] and increases their [[Wetness/DST|Wetness]] by 15. This Wetness can be reduced by Wetness-resistant clothing like [[Umbrella/DST|Umbrella]]. The Portage Conch has no distance limit, but cannot be used in the Cave world.

Playing the Portage Conch can also tend the [[Farm Plant]]s within 3 [[Tile]]s radius.
